name: Nextcloud MCP Server
what_it_does: Nextcloud MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Nextcloud — the self-hosted file storage and collaboration platform — reading and writing files, managing folders, sharing documents, accessing calendar and contacts, and integrating Nextcloud's private cloud capabilities into agent-driven file management and collaboration workflows.
use_cases: Reading and writing files in Nextcloud storage from file management agents
Managing shared documents and folders from collaboration agents
Accessing Nextcloud calendar events from scheduling agents
Uploading generated content to Nextcloud from content creation agents
Building self-hosted document management workflows from privacy-focused agents
Integrating Nextcloud storage into data pipeline agents
not_for: Teams using Google Drive, OneDrive, or Dropbox (use dedicated MCPs for those)
Users without Nextcloud installation (self-hosted or Nextcloud-hosted)
Real-time collaborative editing (Nextcloud Collabora Online not covered)
best_when: A team with self-hosted Nextcloud needs AI agent access to file storage — privacy-first alternative to Google Drive for agent workflows.
avoid_when: You use cloud storage services like Google Drive, Dropbox, or OneDrive — use dedicated MCPs for those services.

auth.notes: Nextcloud username and password or app-specific password required. App passwords recommended for security. Configure Nextcloud server URL.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Nextcloud is free and open source (self-hosted)
pricing.notes: Nextcloud is free open source. MCP server is free open source. Server hosting costs apply for self-hosting.

performance.rate_limits: Nextcloud server dependent — no API rate limits by default

known_agent_gotchas: Nextcloud server URL must be configured — self-hosted setup required
Use app-specific passwords rather than main account password
File paths in WebDAV format — different from typical filesystem paths
Community MCP from cbcoutinho — not official Nextcloud integration
TLS configuration required for production use — self-signed certs need handling
Large file uploads may time out with default settings
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced for production. App-specific passwords recommended. Community MCP. Self-hosted data — full control. GDPR compliant by design. Store credentials securely.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. App passwords recommended. Community MCP. Self-hosted control. GDPR compliant design.
